targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM products

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value
FROM alerts a
JOIN products p ON p.id = a.product_id
JOIN sites s ON s.id = p.site_id
WHERE a.sent_at IS NULL
  AND a.alert_type IN ('price_drop','price_rise','price_changed','new_low')
  AND s.is_active = true

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value
FROM alerts a
JOIN products p ON p.id = a.product_id
JOIN sites s ON s.id = p.site_id
WHERE a.triggered_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND a.alert_type IN ('price_drop','price_rise','price_changed','new_low')
  AND s.is_active = true

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value
FROM parse_runs pr
JOIN sites s ON s.id = pr.site_id
WHERE pr.started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND s.is_active = true

SELECT s.name AS site, pr.status, pr.trigger_type, pr.started_at, pr.finished_at, pr.products_found, pr.errors_count
FROM parse_runs pr
JOIN sites s ON s.id = pr.site_id
WHERE s.is_active = true
ORDER BY pr.started_at DESC
LIMIT 100

WITH cfg AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW()) BETWEEN 3 AND 9 THEN 'Лето' ELSE 'Зима' END AS season_now
),
raw_rows AS (
  SELECT
    ph.product_id,
    ph.scraped_at,
    ph.price,
    p.diameter,
    ((date_trunc('day', (ph.scraped_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Irkutsk'))) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Irkutsk') AS day
  FROM price_history ph
  JOIN products p ON p.id = ph.product_id
  JOIN sites s ON s.id = p.site_id
  CROSS JOIN cfg c
  WHERE ph.scraped_at >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - INTERVAL '14 days'
    AND ph.scraped_at <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
    AND ph.in_stock = true
    AND s.is_active = true
    AND (p.season = c.season_now OR p.season IS NULL)
    AND ('${brand}' = '__all' OR COALESCE(p.brand, 'Unknown') = '${brand}')
),
daily_latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (product_id, day)
    product_id,
    day,
    price,
    diameter
  FROM raw_rows
  ORDER BY product_id, day, scraped_at DESC
),
with_lag AS (
  SELECT
    product_id,
    day,
    price,
    diameter,
    LAG(price) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id ORDER BY day) AS ref_price
  FROM daily_latest
),
top_diameters AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(diameter::text, '?') AS d
  FROM daily_latest
  WHERE day < $__timeTo()::timestamptz
    AND day + INTERVAL '1 day' > $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT 5
),
base AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM with_lag
  WHERE day < $__timeTo()::timestamptz
    AND day + INTERVAL '1 day' > $__timeFrom()::timestamptz
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    (b.day + INTERVAL '12 hours') AS "time",
    CONCAT('R', COALESCE(b.diameter::text, '?')) AS metric,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN b.ref_price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL::double precision
      ELSE (
        ROUND(
          (
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ref_price IS NOT NULL AND b.price < b.ref_price THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ref_price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric
          ),
          2
        )
      )::double precision
    END AS value
  FROM base b
  WHERE COALESCE(b.diameter::text, '?') IN (SELECT td.d FROM top_diameters td)
  GROUP BY 1, 2

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    (b.day + INTERVAL '12 hours') AS "time",
    'Все диаметры' AS metric,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN b.ref_price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL::double precision
      ELSE (
        ROUND(
          (
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.ref_price IS NOT NULL AND b.price < b.ref_price THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.ref_price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric
          ),
          2
        )
      )::double precision
    END AS value
  FROM base b
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT "time", metric, value FROM combined
WHERE value IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS "time",
       'Нет данных в выбранном диапазоне' AS metric,
       0::double precision AS value
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM combined WHERE combined.value IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Доля снижений к пред. дню с данными (топ-5 R + общий) %
panels.description: Быстрый расчёт: эталон = цена в **предыдущий календарный день, где есть парсинг** (LAG по day), без тяжёлых подзапросов. Доля = снижений / товаров с эталоном. Ось X — дни (Asia/Irkutsk). Диапазон: Last 7–30 days.

targets.rawSql:
WITH cfg AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW()) BETWEEN 3 AND 9 THEN 'Лето' ELSE 'Зима' END AS season_now
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    ph.product_id,
    ph.scraped_at,
    ph.price,
    LAG(ph.price) OVER (PARTITION BY ph.product_id ORDER BY ph.scraped_at) AS prev_price
  FROM price_history ph
),
changes AS (
  SELECT
    p.id AS product_id,
    COALESCE(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS brand,
    100.0 * (r.price - r.prev_price) / NULLIF(r.prev_price, 0) AS pct_change
  FROM ranked r
  JOIN products p ON p.id = r.product_id
  JOIN sites s ON s.id = p.site_id
  CROSS JOIN cfg c
  WHERE r.scraped_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    AND r.prev_price IS NOT NULL
    AND r.price <> r.prev_price
    AND s.is_active = true
    AND (p.season = c.season_now OR p.season IS NULL)
    AND ('${brand}' = '__all' OR COALESCE(p.brand, 'Unknown') = '${brand}')
),
main AS (
  SELECT
    brand AS "бренд",
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS "события",
    COUNT(DISTINCT product_id)::bigint AS "товаров_затронуто",
    ROUND(AVG(ABS(pct_change))::numeric, 2) AS "ср_абс_изм_%",
    ROUND(percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ABS(pct_change))::numeric, 2) AS "медиана_абс_изм_%",
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN pct_change < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS "доля_снижений_%",
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN pct_change > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS "доля_роста_%"
  FROM changes
  GROUP BY brand
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  ORDER BY 4 DESC
  LIMIT 30
)
SELECT * FROM main
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Нет изменений цен (7 дн.)'::text,
  0::bigint,
  0::bigint,
  0::numeric,
  0::numeric,
  0::numeric,
  0::numeric
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM main LIMIT 1)

panels.title: Волатильность цен по брендам (сезон мар–сен, 7 дней)

targets.rawSql:
WITH cfg AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW()) BETWEEN 3 AND 9 THEN 'Лето' ELSE 'Зима' END AS season_now
),
latest_now AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (ph.product_id)
    ph.product_id,
    ph.price AS price_now,
    ph.scraped_at AS last_scraped
  FROM price_history ph
  JOIN products p ON p.id = ph.product_id
  JOIN sites s ON s.id = p.site_id
  CROSS JOIN cfg c
  WHERE s.is_active = true
    AND ph.in_stock = true
    AND (p.season = c.season_now OR p.season IS NULL)
    AND ('${brand}' = '__all' OR COALESCE(p.brand, 'Unknown') = '${brand}')
  ORDER BY ph.product_id, ph.scraped_at DESC
),
priced AS (
  SELECT
    ln.product_id,
    ln.price_now,
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT ph2.price
        FROM price_history ph2
        WHERE ph2.product_id = ln.product_id
          AND ph2.scraped_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
        ORDER BY ph2.scraped_at DESC
        LIMIT 1
      ),
      (
        SELECT ph2.price
        FROM price_history ph2
        WHERE ph2.product_id = ln.product_id
          AND ph2.scraped_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days'
        ORDER BY ph2.scraped_at DESC
        LIMIT 1
      ),
      (
        SELECT ph2.price
        FROM price_history ph2
        WHERE ph2.product_id = ln.product_id
          AND ph2.scraped_at < ln.last_scraped
        ORDER BY ph2.scraped_at DESC
        LIMIT 1
      )
    ) AS price_ref
  FROM latest_now ln
),
main AS (
  SELECT
    CONCAT(COALESCE(p.tire_size, '?'), ' R', COALESCE(p.diameter::text, '?')) AS "размер",
    CONCAT('R', COALESCE(p.diameter::text, '?')) AS "диаметр",
    COALESCE(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS "бренд",
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS "товаров",
    ROUND(AVG(pr.price_now)::numeric, 0) AS "ср_цена_сейчас",
    ROUND(AVG(pr.price_ref)::numeric, 0) AS "ср_цена_база",
    ROUND(AVG(((pr.price_now - pr.price_ref) / NULLIF(pr.price_ref, 0)) * 100)::numeric, 2) AS "ср_изм_%",
    ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN pr.price_now < pr.price_ref THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 2) AS "доля_снижений_%"
  FROM priced pr
  JOIN products p ON p.id = pr.product_id
  WHERE pr.price_ref IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  ORDER BY 8 DESC NULLS LAST, 7 ASC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 50
)
SELECT * FROM main
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Нет товаров в выборке'::text,
  '-'::text,
  '-'::text,
  0::bigint,
  0::numeric,
  0::numeric,
  0::numeric,
  0::numeric
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM main LIMIT 1)

panels.title: Топ размеров/диаметров по снижению (сезон мар–сен, база 7д→2д→пред.цена)

list.name: brand
list.label: Brand
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(brand, 'Unknown') AS brand FROM products ORDER BY brand
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(brand, 'Unknown') AS brand FROM products ORDER BY brand
